case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. VS. CHING CUACK CHIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-22-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, CHING CUACK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 B; VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-22-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-22-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR# 4761 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
